title: thelypteris polyotis
intro: Thelypteris polyotis, also known as the lady fern or the maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Thelypteris polyotis include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of Thelypteris polyotis can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or tea to create a soothing drink, or by using the plant's extracts in capsule or tincture form.
